twitter_posts.description:
imo this is the most impt part of anthropic's J-space paper today. it's a two-parter:

1) ant proved that they can do "brain surgery" interventions into reasoning to change topics midstream*
2) THE MODEL IS ABLE TO DETECT WHAT INTERVENTION WAS DONE - close cousin to eval awarenes
